name: Uber Technologies, Inc
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. is a technology platform operating in over 70 countries that connects consumers with independent ride service providers (Mobility), restaurants and retailers with delivery couriers (Delivery via Uber Eats), and shippers with carriers in freight logistics (Freight). The platform leverages proprietary marketplace, routing, and payments technologies across more than 15,000 cities worldwide, serving hundreds of millions of drivers, consumers, merchants, shippers, and carriers.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
